nameOverride.description: Override the chart name component used in resource names.

fullnameOverride.description: Override the fully-qualified app name used in resource names.

imagePullSecrets.description: Image pull secrets for the watcher Deployment.

podAnnotations.description: Annotations added to the watcher Pod.

podLabels.description: Extra labels added to the watcher Pod.

annotations.description: Annotations to add to the watcher ServiceAccount. Use for IRSA, GCP Workload Identity, etc.

nodeSelector.description: Node selector for the watcher Deployment Pod.

tolerations.description: Tolerations for the watcher Deployment Pod.

affinity.description: Affinity rules for the watcher Deployment Pod.

maxInvestigationRetries.description: Maximum investigation retries per RemediationJob before permanently failing.

watchNamespaces.description: Comma-separated namespaces the watcher monitors. Empty = all namespaces.

excludeNamespaces.description: Comma-separated namespaces the watcher ignores. Empty = no exclusions.

dryRun.description: Enable dry-run mode. Blocks write operations; stores investigation reports in a ConfigMap.

prAutoClose.description: Automatically close open GitHub PRs when the underlying finding resolves.

enabled.description: Enable multi-signal correlation. When false, every finding dispatches immediately.

windowSeconds.description: Seconds to hold Pending jobs before dispatching (correlation window).

multiPodThreshold.description: Minimum number of pods failing on the same node to trigger MultiPodSameNodeRule.

resources.description: Resource requests and limits for the watcher Deployment container.

type.description: Agent runner type. Controls which AI agent binary runs inside the Job.

scope.description: RBAC scope for the agent Job. When 'namespace', watchNamespaces must also be set.

watchNamespaces.description: Comma-separated namespaces the agent is permitted to read when scope is 'namespace'.

agentOverride.description: Full agent-specific prompt content override for the selected agent type.

maxDepth.description: Maximum self-remediation chain depth. 0 disables self-remediation.

cooldownSeconds.description: Minimum time between allowed self-remediations in seconds. 0 disables circuit breaker.

cascadeNamespaceThreshold.description: Number of failing namespaces that triggers a cascade abort.

cascadeNodeCacheTTLSeconds.description: How long in seconds node failure data is cached for cascade detection.

enabled.description: Block kubectl get/describe secret(s), get all, exec, and port-forward in agent Jobs.

extraRedactPatterns.description: Additional RE2 regex patterns applied by the watcher and agent redact binary.

kyverno.description: Optional Kyverno ClusterPolicy enforcing agent hardening rules. Requires Kyverno v1.9+.

enabled.description: Enable the Kyverno ClusterPolicy. Default: false.

allowedImagePrefix.description: Image prefix enforced on mechanic-agent Job containers. Empty disables image enforcement.

networkPolicy.description: NetworkPolicy restricting agent Job egress. Requires a CNI that enforces NetworkPolicy.

apiServerPort.description: Port used by the Kubernetes API server. Standard is 6443.

additionalEgressRules.description: Optional additional egress rules appended verbatim to the NetworkPolicy spec.

repo.description: GitHub repository in org/repo format. Required.

manifestRoot.description: Path within the repository containing Kubernetes manifests. Required.

createNamespace.description: Create Release.Namespace if it does not exist.

create.description: Create RBAC resources. Set to false if you manage RBAC externally.

enabled.description: Expose a metrics Service on port 8080.
Create a Prometheus Operator ServiceMonitor CR.
